title: Blue Canyon Figaro Bathroom Tumbler, Toothbrush Holder for Bathroom, Durable Resin Construction, Textured Surface, Portable Bathroom Accessory, Bathroom Cup, Toothbrush Tumbler, Compact, Grey
features: 【 LARGE CAPACITY & LIGHWEIGHT 】: Blue Canyon Figaro bathroom tumbler has a large capacity & can hold multiple belongings such as toothbrushes, toothpastes, make up brushes and other toiletries. Our Lightweight tumbler is designed for easy handling and cleaning, making it an ideal choice.

【 DURABLE & STURDY CONSTRUCTION 】: Crafted from premium-quality, shatter-resistant resin, our bathroom cup is built to last. Unlike fragile glass or flimsy plastic alternatives, this tumbler maintains its structure and appearance even with daily use. It’s an excellent investment in durability and long-term convenience for your bathroom essentials.

【 SLIP – RESISTANT GRIP 】: Designed with a textured surface, blue canyon toothbrush tumbler provides a comfortable and secure grip, ensuring it doesn’t slip easily from wet hands. This added feature enhances its practicality, making it a safe and convenient option for everyday use.

【 SPACE SAVING TUMBLER 】: Maximize your bathroom organization with our Blue Canyon Luxor Toothbrush Tumbler. This elegant tumbler seamlessly brings together your essentials, fostering a tidy space and guaranteeing convenient access to your necessities.

【 EASY TO CLEAN 】: Maintaining hygiene is effortless with the figaro tumbler. Simply rinse it with water or wipe it with a damp cloth to keep it looking fresh and clean. Unlike porous materials that trap moisture, this resin tumbler is resistant to stains and odours, ensuring long-term cleanliness.
